creator: freebsd@ohreally.nl
text:
Hi,

I just installed mod_maxminddb. The following path was added to /usr/local/etc/apache24/httpd.conf:

/usr/ports/www/mod_maxminddb/work/stage/usr/local/libexec/apache24/mod_maxminddb.so

This should be

libexec/apache24/mod_maxminddb.so

The module is installed in the correct location; it's just the addition to httpd.conf that is wrong.

Cheers,
  Rob
